final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire we, // write enable
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] cell_data;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            if (we) begin
                cell_data <= data_in; // Write data to cell_data
            end
            data_out <= cell_data; // Read data from cell_data
        end
    end
endmodule
